title: vicia montenegrina
intro: Vicia montenegrina, also known as Montenegrin vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Vicia montenegrina, including infusions and decoctions, can be made by steeping the dried plant material in hot water to extract its active compounds.
